tasks.subject: Task 1: OBS client Rebuild() method
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `post()` and `Rebuild()` to `backend/internal/obs/client.go`, tested against a stub HTTP server.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/obs/client.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/obs/client_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Rebuild()` issues POST with Basic Auth and path-escaped project
- [ ] Returns nil on 2xx
- [ ] Returns error with body on non-2xx
- [ ] 3 tests pass

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test ./internal/obs/ -run TestRebuild -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/obs/client.go", "backend/internal/obs/client_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/obs/ -run TestRebuild -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Rebuild() issues POST with Basic Auth and path-escaped project", "Returns nil on 2xx", "Returns error with body on non-2xx", "3 tests pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: rebuildHandler and route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `POST /api/rebuild` to the backend API, tested for success, missing fields, and OBS errors.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/handlers.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/handlers_test.go`
- Modify: `backend/internal/api/server.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST /api/rebuild returns 200 + {"status":"ok"} on success
- [ ] Returns 400 when any field is missing
- [ ] Returns 502 when OBS returns an error
- [ ] Route registered in NewRouter

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test ./internal/api/ -run TestRebuild -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/api/handlers.go", "backend/internal/api/handlers_test.go", "backend/internal/api/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/api/ -run TestRebuild -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /api/rebuild returns 200 + status:ok on success", "Returns 400 when any field is missing", "Returns 502 when OBS returns an error", "Route registered in NewRouter"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: useRebuild composable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `frontend/src/composables/useRebuild.ts` with `trigger()`, `isLoading()`, and `errorFor()`.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/composables/useRebuild.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] trigger() POSTs to /api/rebuild
- [ ] isLoading() returns true while in-flight
- [ ] errorFor() returns error message, null on success
- [ ] Error clears after 4 seconds
- [ ] No TypeScript errors

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/composables/useRebuild.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["trigger() POSTs to /api/rebuild", "isLoading() returns true while in-flight", "errorFor() returns error message, null on success", "Error clears after 4 seconds", "No TypeScript errors"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: PackageCard.vue rebuild UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `useRebuild` into `PackageCard.vue` — restart icon on qualifying target rows, spinner during in-flight requests, inline error below the row.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/PackageCard.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Restart icon appears for failed/broken/unresolvable/blocked targets
- [ ] Clicking icon calls triggerRebuild() without toggling expand
- [ ] Spinner animation while loading
- [ ] Error message shown in red below target row, auto-clears after 4s
- [ ] No TypeScript or build errors

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/PackageCard.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Restart icon appears for failed/broken/unresolvable/blocked targets", "Clicking icon calls triggerRebuild() without toggling expand", "Spinner animation while loading", "Error message shown in red below target row, auto-clears after 4s", "No TypeScript or build errors"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
